allow:
Bash(cat >> temp_software.txt << 'EOF'


    [params.software]
        enable = true

        [[params.software.list]]
        title = "Misinformation Detection"
        name = "Yirong Zeng, Juyi Dai, Shen You"
        meta = "Demo System"
        href = "https://huggingface.co/spaces/You-shen/React"
EOF
cat temp_software.txt)

Bash(cat >> config_temp.toml << 'EOF'


    [params.software]
        enable = true

        [[params.software.list]]
        title = "Misinformation Detection"
        name = "Yirong Zeng, Juyi Dai, Shen You"
        meta = "Demo System"
        href = "https://huggingface.co/spaces/You-shen/React"


    [params.social]
        enable = true

        [[params.social.list]]
        icon = "fab fa-github-square"
        url = "https://github.com/zeng-yirong"
        title = "zeng-yirong"






EOF
mv config_temp.toml config.toml)
Bash(ls -la *.png *.jpg *.jpeg 2>/dev/null || echo "No image files in root")
